title: Server Browser
description: Making modded servers easier to find by finding them in game!
body: # **Server Browser** Are you looking for a modded server to play on for the pack you just downloaded? Server Browser makes it easy to find a server to play on! A mod designed for modpack authors to make it easier for their users to find servers to play on! If you are a server owner, you can register it here If you'd like to make a tag request for a modpack (recommended only if you have community servers), do it here ## **Main Menu** This menu can be gotten to by going to the multiplayer screen, and in the top left clicking 'Server Browser' ## **Server Filtering** if you wanted to filter a server by various types, you can do that! ## **For Modpack Authors** ServerBrowser includes features for Modpack authors to make it easier to manage as well! Blacklisted servers will prevent what was entered into the array from appearing in the ServerBrowser, it will not remove anything from a players 'favorite' servers (the regular multiplayer screen) The config allows for a pre determined modpack filter that will remove any other modpacks from the tag list. resulting in something like this: Finally, if you run official servers for your modpack, you can also add them to appear at the top of the players 'favorites' list.
